summary: Mobile sports app with sport activation/deactivation flow. Features include a SportContext (sportStatus, currentSport, deactivateSport), an ActivateSportScreen with a smart modal button that toggles label and action based on active sport status, and auto-filtering of Map and Events by active sport.
architectural_notes: SportContext exposes sportStatus, currentSport, and deactivateSport; consumed by ActivateSportScreen
ActivateSportScreen button label and action are driven by isActive = sportStatus === 'active'

existing_features.title: In ActivateSportScreen, import useSport from SportContext and destructure sportStatus, currentSport, and deactivateSport. Derive a boolean isActive = sportStatus === 'active'.

In ActivateSportScreen, replace the static activation button label with a dynamic label: when isActive is true display 'Deactivate {currentSport}' (e.g. 'Deactivate Soccer'), otherwise display 'Activate My Sport'.
In ActivateSportScreen, update the button's onClick handler so that when isActive is true it calls deactivateSport(), and when isActive is false it calls the existing handleActivate() function.

new_feature_requests.summary: Smart Activation Modal Button: toggle button label/action based on sport active status (Activate My Sport / Deactivate {Sport})
